title: Call-graph-aware edit context compiler
goal: Integrate proven caller/callee evidence into agent impact and token-budget edit context without turning graph relations into impact or test-sufficiency verdicts.

acceptance.assertion: Edit context separately budgets target definition, direct callers, direct callees, entrypoints, tests, contracts and unresolved risk boundaries.
Every selected relation retains source ranges, evidence level, freshness and omission reasons.
The compiler does not claim blast-radius completeness, runtime breakage, test sufficiency or merge readiness.

metadata.source_request: User requested all Symbol Call Graph work to be registered and implemented.

lease_scope_migration.rationale: The Lenskit edit-context compiler reads only its exact Bureau task, shared initiative truth and current plan; all implementation effects remain in Lenskit.
does_not_establish: safe mutation of terminal historical tasks

metadata.outcome: RepoGround edit context now consumes optional Python call-graph evidence, separately budgets target definitions, direct callers, direct callees, entrypoints, tests, contracts and unresolved risk boundaries, and preserves explicit non-verdicts instead of promoting uncertain relations to impact claims.
validation: Exact PR head 502ab91c94d8d958e6b2b33ed3091220306bbc60 was reviewed against diff SHA-256 f4e3f08aaf75b9ad8ad7f96692cd1e54bf202e41c8c8f366233649efa54b7341.
All reported GitHub checks passed, including pytest-full, browser-tests, release-candidate, Ruff, CodeQL, RepoGround CodeQL policy, contracts validation, task-index and ai-context guard.

The PR reports 4,416 passed and two expected skips on the reviewed head; the dedicated adapter and edit-context tests cover S1 caller/callee selection, separate section budgets, source ranges, freshness, omission reasons and non-verdicts.

The optional python_call_graph_json source remains non-blocking when absent; only S1 uniquely resolved relations are promoted to direct caller/callee context, while uncertain or incomplete evidence stays in unresolved risk boundaries.
Head-bound self-review found and removed the pre-publication unbounded omitted-item payload; final sections expose bounded selected items plus aggregate omitted_count and omission_reasons.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t025-selection: PASS: Edit context exposes independent bounded sections for target_definitions, direct_callers, direct_callees, entrypoints, tests, contracts and unresolved_risk_boundaries.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t025-trace: PASS: Selected call relations retain call-site and peer-definition source ranges, evidence level, resolution status/reason, freshness identity and explicit omission_reason; bounded sections also report aggregate omission reasons.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t025-nonverdict: PASS: The compiler explicitly lists complete_blast_radius, runtime_breakage, test_sufficiency and merge_readiness as non-verdicts and does not upgrade S0/candidate/ambiguous evidence to direct relations.
